mutations.change: Serialize SQL frame bytes in row-major order instead of the required column then row canonical order.
mutations.reason: Asymmetric diagnostic pixels and per-column hashes make the ordering observable independently of aggregate counts.

mutations.change: Drop one SQL pixel while leaving reported canvas dimensions unchanged.
mutations.reason: Exact key discovery and dense seen-bit validation reject both gaps and a 63999-row observation.

mutations.change: Duplicate one SQL coordinate and replace another required canvas coordinate with that duplicate.
mutations.reason: The decoder keys every coordinate and rejects a duplicate before accepting full canvas coverage.

mutations.change: Silently coerce an out-of-range SQL palette index to an unsigned byte.
mutations.reason: Range and integrality are checked on SQL observations before allocation or byte coercion.

mutations.change: Allow an equal color run at the bottom of one column to merge with the top of the next.
mutations.reason: Every column begins at row zero and must independently cover exactly 200 rows.

mutations.change: Advance an RLE start row by one so that a required palette pixel is not represented by any run.
mutations.reason: The independent decoder requires every run start to equal the immediately expected next row.

mutations.change: Emit a zero-length run at a palette transition while retaining all surrounding valid run tuples.
mutations.reason: Run lengths are required to be positive before coverage or decoded bytes are considered.

mutations.change: Split one solid run into two adjacent runs with the same palette index.
mutations.reason: Canonical RLE rejects consecutive equal indices even when expansion would otherwise match.

mutations.change: Write the column-major frame bytes directly as PNG scanlines without converting to raster row order.
mutations.reason: Independent PNG parsing maps raster scanlines back to canonical column-row coordinates before comparison.

mutations.change: Expand the indexed palette in blue-green-red channel order instead of red-green-blue.
mutations.reason: The full raw RGBA comparison uses independently indexed PLAYPAL channel tuples and opaque alpha.

mutations.change: Emit transparent alpha for every raw RGBA pixel instead of the required fully opaque alpha channel.
mutations.reason: Every R1 palette pixel has mandated alpha 255 in the diagnostic raw RGBA representation.

mutations.change: Encode diagnostics as truecolor PNG rather than the fixed indexed-color representation.
mutations.reason: IHDR bit depth and color type are parsed and constrained to eight-bit indexed color.

mutations.change: Add a time-dependent ancillary timestamp PNG chunk on each diagnostic image encoding attempt.
mutations.reason: Only IHDR, PLTE, one IDAT, and IEND are permitted and two encodings must be byte identical.

mutations.change: Reuse the spawn-east SQL frame for the north and south diagnostic headings.
mutations.reason: Bound pose metadata and pairwise-distinct SQL frame identities prevent a single canned image from satisfying the checkpoint.

mutations.change: Populate visible golden hashes or mark the visual checkpoint approved without explicit user review.
mutations.reason: The candidate fixture requires pending status and an empty visible-golden list until a separate human action.

mutations.change: Embed expected frame bytes or visible hashes in production or the independent decoder.
mutations.reason: Source audits reject evaluator coupling, fixture-specific payloads, expected hashes, and diagnostic pose answers.
